subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-04 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In previous dispensations, such people felt that they had no need for spiritual teachings
subcodes.first_line_orig: در ظهورات سابقه اینگونه اشخاص خود را مستغنی از تعالیم روحانی می‌گفتند و اصحاب یوم ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause
